changes.comment: Test-only: add an end-to-end verification suite exercising the two load-bearing constraints (graceful + NOISY schema-bearing degradation; the probe report) against a REAL in-memory MCP server (SDK `Server` + `InMemoryTransport`), advertising one tool per `JsonSchema.fromJson`-rejected feature ($ref, oneOf, anyOf, pattern, union type[]). Hardens the `sdk.ts` projection casts that line-coverage of a mocked seam cannot reach. No production code change.
